zh.Dunster, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特
zh.Dunster, Somersetshire Co., England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald de Mohun於1183年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特時，他的父親William de Mohun27歲，母親Lucy de Cambridge19歲。他和Alice de Briwere至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1213年在他的家鄉享年30歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特登斯特。

zh-hans.Dunster, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特
zh-hans.Dunster, Somersetshire Co., England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald de Mohun于1183年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特时，他的父亲William de Mohun27岁，母亲Lucy de Cambridge19岁。他和Alice de Briwere至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1213年在他的家乡享年30岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特登斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald de Mohun was born in 1183, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Mohun, was 27 and his mother, Lucy de Cambridge, was 19. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Alice de Briwere. He died in 1213, in his hometown, at the age of 30, and was buried in Dunster, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald de Mohun est né en 1183, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Mohun, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lucy de Cambridge, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Alice de Briwere. Il est décédé en 1213, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald de Mohun 1183 in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Mohun 27 und seine Mutter Lucy de Cambridge 19. Er hatte mit Alice de Briwere mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1213 im Alter von 30 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dunster, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald de Mohun è nato il nel 1183 nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Mohun, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lucy de Cambridge, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Alice de Briwere. Morì nel 1213, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunster, Somerset, England.

ja.Dunster, Somersetshire Co., England: イギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスター
ja.lifeSummary: Reginald de Mohunが1183年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父William de Mohunは27歳，母Lucy de Cambridgeは19歳であった。彼はAlice de Briwereとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1213年に故郷で30歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトダンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald de Mohun(이)가 1183년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Mohun(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy de Cambridge(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Alice de Briwere(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1213년 그의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 던스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald de Mohun nasceu em 1183, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Mohun, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lucy de Cambridge, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Alice de Briwere. Ele faleceu em 1213, em sua cidade natal, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald de Mohun родился в 1183 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Mohun было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy de Cambridge, 19. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Alice de Briwere. Он умер в 1213 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reginald de Mohun nació en 1183, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Mohun, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lucy de Cambridge, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Alice de Briwere. Murió en 1213, en su pueblo, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra.
